# QA Plan: Sprint 11 — Save-persist workstream + Audio MVP

**Date**: 2026-05-12
**Generated by**: /qa-plan (retroactive — Sprint 11 effectively closed pre-emptively on 2026-05-05)
**Scope**: 12 planned Sprint 11 stories (4 Must Have + 5 Should Have + 3 Nice to Have); 11 bonus stories noted separately
**Engine**: Godot 4.6
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-11.md`

---

## Retroactive Context

Sprint 11's nominal window is 2026-05-16 → 2026-05-25, but the entire Must-Have scope and most Should-Have scope was executed pre-emptively on 2026-05-05 in autonomous-execution mode. This QA plan is **retroactive** — its purpose is record-keeping (tying ACs to existing test files for traceability) rather than gating implementation that hasn't started. All Logic/Integration stories listed below already have passing test files; this plan inventories them.

For the **forward-looking** Sprint 11 carry-forwards (S11-S5 re-playtest, S11-N1/N2 audio expansion), see `production/qa/qa-plan-sprint-12-*.md`.

**One discrepancy resolved during this audit**: S11-S1 (scene-manager Story 009 reduce_motion + offline-replay modal) was marked `carry-forward` in `production/sprint-status.yaml` 2026-05-12, but the story file itself shows `Status: Complete (per-AC verification 2026-05-08)`. The YAML is being updated separately to reflect this.

## Automated Tests Required — Inventory (retroactive)

### S11-M1 — scene-manager Story 008 — Integration
**Test file**: `tests/integration/scene_manager/scene_boundary_persist_emission_test.gd` (exists)
**ACs covered**: AC-1 (signal declared), AC-2 (signal emits at cross-screen transition), AC-3 (emits exactly once per transition), AC-4 (save_failed → modal trigger), and 3 more — per Sprint 11 S11-M1 closure note (7 dedicated tests).
**Edge cases**: Same-screen re-entry (no emission); back-to-back transitions (one emission each); transition during pause (signal still emits at boundary commit).

### S11-M2 — TickSystem heartbeat — Integration
**Test files**:
- `tests/unit/tick_system/heartbeat_accumulator_test.gd` (TickSystem-side accumulator)
- `tests/integration/save_load/save_persist_roundtrip_test.gd` (heartbeat-driven persist invocation, post-M2b decision absorbed into full persist)

**ACs covered**: TickSystem accumulates ticks since last persist (verified via accumulator unit tests); heartbeat trigger fires `request_full_persist` (post-M2b mutation — partial envelope superseded).
**Scope note**: Original story-011 contract was "≤512 byte partial envelope". M2b decision changed scope to "full persist sharing the same envelope schema". The ≤512-byte AC is **SUPERSEDED**; no test asserts that constraint.

### S11-M3 — save-load Story 012 (`_on_scene_boundary_persist` body) — Integration
**Test file**: covered by `tests/integration/save_load/save_persist_roundtrip_test.gd` Group A + scene_boundary_persist_emission tests
**ACs covered**: `_on_scene_boundary_persist` body replaces `pass`; awaits `save_completed`/`save_failed` per Save/Load GDD Rule 5; scene transition blocks until persist completes; transition continues regardless on save_failed (defensive).
**Edge cases**: Persist failure with corrupted disk; persist during pause; persist while another persist is in-flight (queue or reject).

### S11-M4 — save-load Story 016 (end-to-end save-persist) — Integration (CRITICAL)
**Test file**: `tests/integration/save_load/save_persist_roundtrip_test.gd`
**ACs covered**:
- ✅ AC-1 (full-envelope round-trip) — JSON.stringify byte-equality across 7 consumers (HeroRoster, Economy, FloorUnlock, TickSystem, DungeonRunOrchestrator, FormationAssignment, Recruitment)
- ✅ AC-3 (scene_boundary_persist receiver wiring) — covered by S11-M1 + S11-M3
- ✅ AC-5 (atomic write file shape) — `.tmp` absent post-success; `.dat` size = 44 + payload_length; MAGIC bytes verified
- ✅ AC-6 (FLAGS bit0 tamper) — Group F tamper-detection coverage
- ⚠️ AC-2 — SUPERSEDED by S11-M2b decision (full persist sharing schema)
- ⚠️ AC-4 (save_failed transition abort) — DEFERRED to Sprint 12+ Story 015
- ⚠️ AC-7/8 (persist + load p95 latency benchmarks) — DEFERRED to Sprint 12+ Story 015 (perf verification)
- ⚠️ AC-9 (manual close-reload smoke) — **DEFERRED to Sprint 12 S12-S1 re-playtest** (requires real Godot build, not auto-doable)

**Edge cases covered by existing tests**: Tamper detection (FLAGS bit0); `.bak` rotation + recovery; both-corrupt CORRUPT terminal state; DataRegistry ERROR short-circuit; persist-while-loading guards.

### S11-S1 — scene-manager Story 009 (reduce_motion + offline-replay modal) — Integration
**Test files**:
- `tests/integration/scene_manager/reduce_motion_clamp_test.gd`
- `tests/integration/scene_manager/offline_replay_modal_coordination_test.gd`

**ACs covered**: `reduce_motion` user preference persists to `user://*.cfg`; tween durations clamp to 0 when flag set; offline-replay modal shows at ≥100 ms offline-elapsed threshold via `SceneManager.show_modal`; Settings overlay exposes the toggle per ADR-0008.
**Edge cases**: First-launch (no .cfg file → default off); cfg-file corruption (graceful fallback to default); modal-during-modal stacking; reduce_motion + offline-replay simultaneous (reduce_motion wins on tween duration).

### S11-S2 — AudioRouter autoload skeleton + bus layout — Logic
**Test file**: `tests/unit/audio_router/audio_router_skeleton_test.gd`
**ACs covered**: Autoload registered; bus layout matches ADR-0003 amendment (SFX bus, music bus, ambient bus); volume API stub present.
**Edge cases**: Pre-`_ready()` invocations; double-autoload registration; missing-bus fallback.

### S11-S3 — AudioRouter CONSUMER_PATHS + AC-AS-09 round-trip — Integration
**Test file**: `tests/unit/audio_router/audio_router_signal_handlers_test.gd`
**ACs covered**: CONSUMER_PATHS registry contains all expected consumer paths; AC-AS-09 round-trip — AudioRouter state survives save/load (per audio-system.md §K).
**Edge cases**: Unregistered consumer path lookup; consumer-path conflict; save/load with mid-flight audio.

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### S11-M4 AC-9 — Re-playtest with persisted save (deferred to Sprint 12 S12-S1)
**Verification method**: Manual playtest session
**Who must sign off**: producer + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: Written playtest notes at `production/playtests/playtest-05-sprint-11-save-persist-2026-XX-XX.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Launch fresh Godot build
- [ ] Dispatch a hero to forest_reach floor 1
- [ ] Clear floor 1 (full combat sequence)
- [ ] Force-quit the game (Cmd-Q / Alt-F4)
- [ ] Reopen the game
- [ ] **Verify**: hero levels match pre-quit state
- [ ] **Verify**: gold balance matches pre-quit state
- [ ] **Verify**: run state matches pre-quit state (floor cleared, formation intact)
- [ ] **Verify**: no error toast, no corrupt save modal
- [ ] **Verify**: felt-progression moment (level-up toast did NOT replay)

*This checklist is the literal Sprint 11 sprint-goal statement; passing it is the final live-confirm of Sprint 11's save-persist workstream.*

### S11-S4 — Signal subs + UI tap chime (carry-forward to Sprint 12)
**Verification method**: Manual interaction walkthrough + audio audibility check
**Who must sign off**: audio-director + qa-tester
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip of UI taps with audible chime; signal-fired audit log

Checklist (when implemented):
- [ ] UI tap on any button plays the tap chime
- [ ] hero_leveled signal triggers level-up chime
- [ ] floor_cleared_first_time signal triggers fanfare chime
- [ ] enemy_killed signal triggers SFX
- [ ] boss_killed signal triggers boss-kill SFX
- [ ] gold_changed signal triggers coin chime (rate-limited)
- [ ] state_changed signal triggers state-transition cue

### S11-N1 / S11-N2 — Audio music/stinger (deferred)
**Verification method**: Audio playback session + designer sign-off
**Who must sign off**: audio-director + creative-director
**Evidence to capture**: Video clip showing biome music transitions + stinger ducking

Checklist (when implemented):
- [ ] Guild Hall hosts quiet ambient bed
- [ ] Dispatching to a dungeon swaps to biome music via 800 ms crossfade
- [ ] Stinger cues duck the music bed during reward fanfare
- [ ] Crossfade timing perceptually correct (no audible cut)

### S11-N3 — Audio asset placeholders (carry-forward to Sprint 12 S12-S5)
**Verification method**: Spot-check via test or in-engine
**Who must sign off**: technical-artist
**Evidence to capture**: Test pass at `tests/unit/data_registry/audio_path_resolve_test.gd` (or similar)

Checklist:
- [ ] All canonical audio paths in DataRegistry resolve to a stub file (silent .ogg / .wav)
- [ ] DataRegistry.resolve() does not error on audio category
- [ ] Stub files are <1 KB each (silence-only)

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for Sprint 11:

1. ✓ Game launches to main menu without crash — covered by `tests/integration/scene_manager/mainroot_boot_wiring_test.gd`
2. ✓ New game / new session can be started — covered by main_menu integration tests
3. ✓ **Save / load cycle completes without data loss** — `tests/integration/save_load/save_persist_roundtrip_test.gd` (THE critical path for Sprint 11)
4. ✓ Scene transitions trigger persist correctly — `scene_boundary_persist_emission_test.gd`
5. ✓ Tamper detection + .bak recovery — `tamper_detection_test.gd` (17 tests, 3 groups)
6. ✓ Heartbeat persist does not duplicate full persist — `heartbeat_accumulator_test.gd`
7. ⏳ Re-playtest with real build — deferred to Sprint 12 S12-S1

**Smoke verification status**: ✓ PASS. Last full suite run 2026-05-09: **1763/1763 tests passing, 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 flaky / 0 skipped / 0 orphans**.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|---------------|--------------|---------------------|
| S11-M4 AC-9 + S11-S5 | Confirm dispatch → clear → kill → reopen → state restored feels correct (no perceptual jank, no replay artifacts) | 1 | Solo dev or 1 fresh-eyes tester |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/playtests/playtest-05-sprint-11-save-persist-2026-XX-XX.md` and reviewed by producer + qa-tester before Sprint 11 can be formally marked CLOSED (rather than CLOSED-WITH-NOTES). Currently carried forward to Sprint 12 S12-S1.

## Definition of Done — Sprint 11

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [x] All Must Have acceptance criteria verified — automated via existing tests; AC-9 deferred to S12-S1
- [x] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories — verified above
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for AC-9 (S12-S1 re-playtest) — **PENDING** (carry-forward)
- [x] Smoke check passes — 1763/1763 tests passing as of 2026-05-09
- [x] No S1 or S2 bugs in delivered features
- [x] Code reviewed (inline via Solo mode — no `/code-review` runs)
- [x] Story files updated to `Status: Complete` — verified for Story 008, 011, 012, 016, 009 (all Sprint 11 Must Have / S11-S1 story files show Complete)

**Sprint 11 QA verdict**: **CLOSED WITH NOTES (retroactive)**. All automated test evidence exists for Must Haves; manual playtest AC-9 deferred to Sprint 12 S12-S1 as a known carry-forward.
